title: DreamTools
summary: Local trainer menu with configurable combat, resource and utility options.
features: In-game menu with F5
God mode, infinite mana, no cooldowns and auto heal
Damage, gold, dream dust, XP and move speed multipliers
100% crit chance and teleport to cursor
Quick hotkeys and console commands
Reward Variety for recently repeated memories and essences
Optional Yubar Star Cookie protection in private co-op
Profile name color helper for rich-text name tags
HUD / UI controls for Field of View, FPS and ping
Pop-up notification duration and cooldown notification visibility
Separate auto collectors for Stardust, Yubar Star Cookies and Bismuth Books of Knowledge
Optional Auto-Skip Cutscenes utility
One-Hit Stones for Gold and Dream Dust stones
Faster Looting for resource pickup travel and radius
Shrine of Guidance Boost for larger radius and lower activation delay
Fast Hold to Upgrade for memory and gem upgrades
Audio Effects Limiter for repeated entity sounds
Hit Effects Mode with Default, Limit and Disable options
Native game-style panel with Status, Combat, Auto Attack, Resources, Player Utility, HUD / UI, Map / UI, Host / Server, Network / Coop, Commands, Diagnostics and Hotkeys
Visible loading progress and localized diagnostics after Apply Mod
